description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the docker:latest image and a docker:dind service. Set a before_script that logs in to registry.gitlab.com with echo $DOCKER_PWD | docker login registry.gitlab.com -u $DOCKER_USER --password-stdin, and an after_script that removes all Docker images via docker rmi $(docker images -a -q). Define two stages: build and masterBuild. Add a build job in the build stage that runs echo $DISCORD_DEFAULTS > config.json then docker build -t registry.gitlab.com/ucgc/discord .; add a push job in the masterBuild stage that runs only on the master branch, executes echo $DISCORD_DEFAULTS > config.json, docker build -t registry.gitlab.com/ucgc/discord . and docker push registry.gitlab.com/ucgc/discord.
